title: cannotCalculateChanges not handled: loops on error instead of falling back to full reload
description: chat_delta_sync handles Err(e) from chat_changes by sending an error event and returning None. Returning None leaves chat_state unchanged. The next SSE StateChange event containing Chat will call chat_changes again with the same stale baseline. If the server returned cannotCalculateChanges (RFC 8620 §5.5: server cannot enumerate changes since that state), it will return the same error again. This loops indefinitely, emitting error toasts every time the Chat type appears in a StateChange, with no automatic recovery. Per RFC 8620 §5.5, cannotCalculateChanges MUST be treated as a signal to perform a full resync (equivalent to the has_more_changes=true path). Fix: match on ClientError::MethodError { error_type, .. } where error_type == 'cannotCalculateChanges' (or 'cannotCalculateChanges' appears in the error type), and call load_chats as a fallback.
close_reason: Fixed: detect ClientError::MethodError{cannotCalculateChanges} in chat_delta_sync and fall back to full load_chats reload
